_comment: MCP Server Card for Future Intelligen. STATUS: planned — no live MCP server endpoint exists yet. This file documents intent and provides discovery metadata. When a real MCP server is deployed, update 'transport.endpoint' and set 'status' to 'active'.

serverInfo.name: future-intelligen-mcp
serverInfo.description: Planned MCP server for Future Intelligen — will expose company info, services catalog, and contact actions to AI agents.

transport.note: Endpoint not yet provisioned. Static hosting (Hostinger) does not expose long-running processes; an edge function or external host is required.
